_metadata.title: 全球PPE认证申报流程手册 (Global PPE Certification Procedures)
_metadata.description: 各主要市场PPE产品的认证流程、所需文件、周期和费用说明

steps.action: Prepare Technical Documentation
steps.description: 包括产品描述、设计图纸、材料清单(BOM)、风险评估报告

steps.action: Ensure conformity with applicable harmonized standards or other technical specifications
Issue EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC)
steps.description: 制造商自行签署合规声明

steps.action: Affix CE marking
steps.description: 在产品本体、包装或随附文件上加贴CE标识

steps.action: Place on market
steps.description: 向成员国市场监管机构备案

pathways.pathway_name: EU Type Examination (Module B) + Conformity to Type (Module C)

steps.action: EU Type Examination (Module B)
steps.description: 向Notified Body (NB)提交技术文件、样品和测试报告，NB进行型式检验

steps.action: NB issues EU Type Examination Certificate
steps.description: 有效期通常5年

steps.action: Module C: 制造商声明批量生产产品与Type Examination样品一致
Issue EU Declaration of Conformity
Affix CE marking + NB四位数编号
steps.description: CE标志旁标注NB编号，如CE 0158

steps.action: Place on market

documents_required: Test Reports from ISO/IEC 17025 accredited lab
pathways.validity: EU Type Certificate valid 5 years, renewable

pathways.pathway_name: Module B + Module C2 (Product Verification) or Module D (Production QA)

steps.action: EU Type Examination per Module B by NB
steps.description: NB审查技术文件并进行必要的物、化、生物测试

steps.action: Module C2: NB对每批产品进行抽样测试
steps.description: 或 Module D: 制造商建立ISO 9001质量体系，NB进行年度审核

steps.action: NB issues Module C2 verification certificate or Module D QMS certificate
Issue EU Declaration of Conformity
Affix CE + NB number
NB conducts annual surveillance for Module D (site audit)

pathways.validity: Type Certificate 5 years; Module D surveillance annual

sections: List of harmonized standards applied in full or in part
Descriptions adopted for conformity where harmonized standards not applied
Copy of EU Declaration of Conformity
User instructions in Member State language

steps.action: Product testing by ISO/IEC 17025 accredited lab per applicable ANSI/ASTM standard
Manufacturer self-declares compliance with relevant ANSI/ISEA standard
Affix product label with manufacturer info, model, applicable standard, protection class
No premarket submission required (except respirators)

documents_required: Product labeling per ANSI Z87.1/ANSI Z89.1/etc.

steps.action: Submit application to NIOSH National Personal Protective Technology Laboratory (NPPTL)
steps.description: 在线提交,包含产品描述、图纸、材料清单

steps.action: NIOSH reviews application package
NIOSH issues testing fee notice
Submit product samples to NIOSH testing facility
NIOSH conducts performance testing
steps.description: 过滤效率、呼吸阻力、密合性等

steps.action: NIOSH issues Approval (TC number)
steps.description: TC-84A-xxxx 格式

steps.action: NIOSH conducts annual site audit and product audit
Affix NIOSH approval label

documents_required: Quality Plan (per 42 CFR Part 84 Subpart E)

steps.action: Determine product classification and predicate device
steps.description: 查询FDA Product Classification Database

steps.action: Conduct testing per applicable FDA-recognized consensus standards
Prepare 510(k) submission
steps.description: 通过eSubmitter或CDRH Portal提交

steps.action: FDA review (typically 90 days for traditional 510(k))
FDA issues SE (Substantially Equivalent) decision letter + K number
Register establishment and list device per 21 CFR Part 807

documents_required: Class III Summary and Certification (if applicable)
pathways.cost_estimate: $10,000-50,000 (510(k) preparation + testing) + FDA user fee $21,760 (FY2026, standard, small business $5,440)
pathways.validity: Perpetual (annual establishment registration + device listing renewal)

pathways.ppe_type: 医用防护用品 NMPA注册 Class II

steps.action: 分类界定 Classification Determination
steps.description: 向NMPA医疗器械标准管理中心申请分类界定

steps.action: 型式检验 Type Testing
steps.description: 委托CNAS认可的医疗器械检验机构进行注册检验

steps.action: 临床试验/评价 Clinical Evaluation
steps.description: 如不在免临床目录内，需进行临床试验或同品种比对

steps.action: 质量管理体系核查 QMS Audit
steps.description: 省级NMPA进行GMP现场核查 (参照YY/T 0287/ISO 13485)

steps.action: 提交注册申请 Submit Registration
steps.description: 通过医疗器械注册电子申报系统(eRPS)向省级NMPA提交

steps.action: 技术审评 Technical Review
steps.description: 法定60工作日完成（第二类）

steps.action: 行政审批 Administrative Approval
steps.description: 20工作日

steps.action: 颁发医疗器械注册证 Issue Registration Certificate
steps.description: 注册证编号格式: 国械注准/省械注准 + 数字

documents_required: 证明性文件（营业执照等）
医疗器械安全有效基本要求清单
产品说明书和标签样稿
pathways.validity: 注册证5年,到期前6个月续证

pathways.ppe_type: 特种劳动防护用品 LA安全标志
pathways.pathway_name: 特种劳动防护用品安全标志认证 (LA)

steps.action: 产品需先取得全国工业产品生产许可证 (SC)
向应急管理部授权的特种劳动防护用品安全标志管理中心提交申请
送样至LA认可检测机构进行型式检验
steps.description: 依据适用GB标准

steps.action: 现场评审 (工厂质量保证能力审查)
综合评审合格后颁发《特种劳动防护用品安全标志证书》
在产品上标示LA标志

documents_required: 主要生产设备和检测设备清单

steps.action: 选择 UK Approved Body (UKAB/UKMCAB)
steps.description: 英国认可的认证机构取代EU Notified Body

steps.action: UK Type Examination
steps.description: 等同于Module B,但由UKAB执行

steps.action: Conformity Assessment
steps.description: 等同于Module C/C2/D, 由UKAB监督

steps.action: Issue UK Declaration of Conformity
Affix UKCA marking (GB) or UKNI + CE (NI)
Appoint UK Responsible Person (UKRP)
steps.description: 非英国制造商必须指定

procedures.note: Northern Ireland market requires UKNI marking + EU CE marking under NI Protocol

steps.action: Class I (一般医疗器械): 届出 Todokede (notification)
steps.description: 向PMDA提交,无需RCB审核

steps.action: Class II (管理医疗器械): 認証 Ninsho
steps.description: Registered Certification Body (RCB)审评,依据JIS标准

steps.action: Class III/IV (高度管理): 承認 Shonin
steps.description: PMDA审评,需完整的临床前和质量管理体系文件

steps.action: 取得製造販売承認書 (MAH approval)

key_requirements: MAH (製造販売業者) license required
QMS per MHLW Ordinance No.169 (ISO 13485 aligned)
Labeling in Japanese per PMD Act requirements

steps.action: Industrial PPE KCs Safety Certification (安全认证)
steps.description: KATRI或KTL等指定机构进行型式试验和工厂审查

steps.action: Medical Device MFDS KGMP certification + product approval

procedures.special: KF Respirator Standard (KF80/KF94/KF99) regulated by MFDS per Health Mask Standard - requires separate MFDS notification for medical devices

steps.action: 产品送INMETRO认可的实验室(OCP)检测,依据适用ABNT/NBR标准
OCP进行工厂审核
OCP颁发Conformity Certificate
MTE/DSST/SIT审查并颁发CAEPI证书
CAEPI有效5年,每12-18个月OCP进行持续监督审核
产品送BIS认可实验室按IS标准检测
BIS工厂审核 (FO, Foreign Manufacturer Certification Scheme)
BIS颁发ISI Mark许可证
BIS进行年度监督审核和market surveillance抽样
产品送GSO认可的NB实验室检测,依据GSO标准
NB工厂审核
NB颁发G-Mark / GCTS证书
产品加贴GCTS标志（含二维码追溯系统）
Australian Sponsor 向 TGA 提交 Conformity Assessment evidence
TGA审查技术文件和CE/FDA/ISO证据
TGA Conformity Assessment Certificate (Class IIb-III)
ARTG Inclusion (include in Australian Register of Therapeutic Goods)
Class I: MDEL establishment license only
Class II-IV: ISO 13485 (MDSAP) QMS certification required
Submit MDL application with safety/effectiveness evidence
Health Canada review: Class II 15 days, Class III 60 days, Class IV 75 days
产品送EAEU认可的测试实验室检测 (依据TR CU 019/2011 + GOST)
工厂审核 (由EAEU认可的认证机构执行)
颁发EAC Certificate (Сертификат соответствия) 或 EAC Declaration
产品加贴EAC标志 (ЕАС)
有效期: 单批次/1-5年 (根据认证方案)

slowest_to_market: US FDA PMA Class III (18-36+ months)
